title: Australia & The European Union Sign Long-Awaited Free Trade Agreement | 10 News
description: Australia and the European Union have finally put pen to paper, signing a historic free trade agreement after eight years of negotiations spanning three Prime Ministers. The agreement will pump 10 billion dollars into our economy every year, and promises to bring down the price of European goods here at home, but farmers have slammed the deal, calling it a farce. title: Queensland To Ban Under 16s From Riding E-Scooters & E-Bikes | 10 News
description: Under 16s will be banned from riding e-mobility devices across Queensland by the middle of the year.   The State Government today announcing it will implement all recommendations from a Parliamentary inquiry, which recommended parents be responsible for riders doing the wrong thing. title: Uber Price Hike, Hero Guard Stops Crime, Trump Market Fears, Baby's Miracle Survival | 10 News+
description: A Melbourne security guard is being called a hero after stopping alleged crooks but some say he may have gone too far. What do you think?  The rideshare giant Uber has announced it will be increasing prices across Australia amid the ongoing fuel crisis.  A major new EU trade agreement has divided the country with some rejoicing at the news while others have had fierce criticism, including the new Nationals Leader Matt Canavan calling it one of the worst deals in history. So here’s what it means for global trade and Australia.  Unusual market activity just before Donald Trump’s announcement on alleged conversations with Iran has raised concerns about possible insider trading after claims no such meeting has taken place.  At just 10 months old, little Ryder was diagnosed with a rare and aggressive brain tumour, with doctors giving him only a 10 per cent chance of survival. title: $580m Bet On Oil Prices Placed 15 Minutes Before Trump’s Iran Post | 10 News
description: There are growing concerns that insiders are profiting off the war in Iran after another well-timed bet was made.  The Financial Times revealed $580 million USD was bet on oil prices falling just 15 minutes before US President Donald Trump announced ‘productive’ talks regarding the total resolution of hostilities in the Middle East. title: Australian Farmers Furious Over EU Trade Deal | 10 News
description: Some Australian farmers are furious with the free trade agreement signed with the European Union, claiming they’d be better off left without it.  The long-awaited deal will see cheaper European products at the supermarket and ensure we can continue using geographical indicators like Parmesan, Kansky and Prosecco.
